hero.title: Fleet maintenance, powered by AI clarity.
hero.subtitle: Track boats, equipment, and maintenance tasks across your organization — with intelligent signals to stay ahead.

problem.title: From scattered notes to confident maintenance
problem.item1_description: Spreadsheets, messages, and memories make it hard to trust what’s been done.
problem.item2_description: Without clear due dates or hour counters, critical work slips quietly.

features.title: Everything your fleet needs
features.subtitle: Built on organization-scoped data with clean workflows and subtle automation.
features.item1_description: Structured specs for hull, engines, sails, and critical systems.
features.item2_description: Plan by date or engine hours, assign, and track completion.
features.item3_description: Log interventions with replaced parts for future diagnostics.
features.item4_description: Multi-tenant by design: teams see exactly what they should.
features.item5_description: Overdue + due-soon signals, so your backlog stays safe.
features.item6_description: Ask questions in context and get the next best action.

use_cases.title: Made for real operators
use_cases.item1_description: Keep uptime high with a single source of truth for maintenance.
use_cases.item2_description: Standardize checklists, parts tracking, and intervention quality.
use_cases.item3_description: Know what’s due, what’s urgent, and what to budget next.

preview.title: A dashboard that stays calm
preview.subtitle: You get the essentials first: urgent work, upcoming work, and context per boat.

security.title: Security & reliability, without drama
security.item1_description: Secure sessions and consistent access patterns.
security.item2_description: Data scoped to your org by default — no accidental leaks.
security.item3_description: Maintenance history is structured and traceable over time.
security.item4_description: Designed to support safe backups and restore workflows.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.item1_q: Is Fleetide AI a maintenance app or a CMMS?
faq.item1_a: It’s a modern maintenance system focused on fleet realities: boats, equipment, hours, and history.
faq.item2_a: Yes. The app is multi-tenant and scopes access by organization.
faq.item3_a: It helps surface signals and answer contextual questions from your data.
faq.item4_a: Yes. Pricing is illustrative today; billing can be connected later.
faq.item5_a: The UI is responsive and optimized for operators on the move.
faq.item6_a: The model is structured to enable exports and reporting.

final_cta.title: Start with clarity. Scale with confidence.
final_cta.subtitle: Get a clean fleet record, then let AI highlight what needs action.

pricing.subtitle: Simple plans for fleets of any size. Start small, scale safely.
